creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
(In reply to Olivier - interfaSys sàrl from comment #0)
> This port is listed as having no dependency and yet it can't be installed
> due to a missing lib.

I cannot reproduce the problem.

> 
> I'm using gcc from ports to compile the app.
> 
> The command in the test:
> # gcc48 -std=gnu99 -o conftest -O2 -pipe conftest.c -lrt -lidn  >&5

Please provide more info, a full log of the install process will do.
